open_feedback: When I saw the new design, my first reaction was, where did everything go?
The color contrast is so low I can barely read the secondary text

The loading time is really frustrating, especially when I'm trying to pull up something in a meeting

The fact that I can't undo a bulk action makes me nervous every time I use it Though I'd add: switching between projects is painfully slow, there's no quick switcher
